reports.title: Activity items
reports.query:
MATCH (n1:ActivityInstanceValue)
WHERE n1.name in $neodash_activityinstancevalue_name
MATCH (n1)-[r1:CONTAINS_ACTIVITY_ITEM]-(ai:ActivityItem)

MATCH
  (ai)-[r2:HAS_ACTIVITY_ITEM]-
  (n6:ActivityItemClassRoot)-[r3:LATEST_FINAL]-
  (n7:ActivityItemClassValue)
MATCH (n1)-[r4:LATEST_FINAL]-(n8:ActivityInstanceRoot)
MATCH
  (n1)-[r5:HAS_ACTIVITY]-
  (n9:ActivityGrouping)-[r6:HAS_GROUPING]-
  (n10:ActivityValue)-[r7:LATEST_FINAL]-
  (n11:ActivityRoot)
MATCH
  (n1)-[r8:ACTIVITY_INSTANCE_CLASS]-
  (n12:ActivityInstanceClassRoot)-[r9:LATEST_FINAL]-
  (n13:ActivityInstanceClassValue)



// Make sure that the query works in both previous (PRD) and new (DEV) model
// Previous model: ActivityGrouping-[r10:IN_SUBGROUP]-(ActivityValidGroup)-[r11:IN_GROUP]-(ActivityGroupValue)
OPTIONAL MATCH
  (n9)-[r12:IN_SUBGROUP]-
  (old_avg:ActivityValidGroup)-[r13:IN_GROUP]-
  (old_agv:ActivityGroupValue)
OPTIONAL MATCH (old_avg)-[r14:HAS_GROUP]-(old_asgv:ActivitySubGroupValue)
// New model: ActivityGrouping-[r15:HAS_SELECTED_GROUP]-(ActivityGroupValue)
OPTIONAL MATCH
  (n9)-[r16:HAS_SELECTED_GROUP]-
  (new_agv:ActivityGroupValue)
OPTIONAL MATCH (n9)-[r17:HAS_SELECTED_SUBGROUP]-(new_asgv:ActivitySubGroupValue)

OPTIONAL MATCH
  (ai)-[r18:HAS_CT_TERM]->
  (n3:CTTermRoot)-[r19:HAS_ATTRIBUTES_ROOT]->
  (n4:CTTermAttributesRoot)-[r20:LATEST_FINAL]-
  (n5:CTTermAttributesValue)
OPTIONAL MATCH
  (ai)-[r21:HAS_UNIT_DEFINITION]->
  (udr:UnitDefinitionRoot)-[r22:LATEST_FINAL]->
  (udv:UnitDefinitionValue)

WITH
  COALESCE(collect(new_agv.name)[0], collect(old_agv.name)[0]) AS `Assm. group`,
  COALESCE(collect(new_asgv.name)[0], collect(old_asgv.name)[0]) AS `Assm. subgroup`,
  n10.name AS activity,
  n1.name AS activity_instance,
  n13.name AS ActivityInstanceClassValue,
  n1.topic_code AS TOPIC_CD,
  n7.name AS activity_item_type,
  COALESCE(n5.name_submission_value, n5.code_submission_value, udv.name) AS term
RETURN
  `Assm. group`,
  `Assm. subgroup`,
  activity,
  activity_instance,
  ActivityInstanceClassValue,
  TOPIC_CD,
  activity_item_type,
  "" as codelist,
  apoc.text.join(collect(DISTINCT term), '|') AS activity_item_value
ORDER BY TOPIC_CD

reports.title: Select Activity Instances
reports.query:
MATCH (n:`ActivityInstanceValue`) 
WHERE toLower(toString(n.`name`)) CONTAINS toLower($input) 
RETURN DISTINCT n.`name` as value,  n.`name` as display ORDER BY size(toString(value)) ASC LIMIT 5
